Module com.trifasico.x50zo
Package com.trifasico.x50zo.model.listeners

Interface IGameEventListener

All Known Implementing Classes:
GameEventAdapter
public interface IGameEventListener
Observer interface for game lifecycle events emitted by TurnManager.

The JavaFX controller implements (or extends GameEventAdapter from) this interface to react to model events without polling. The model knows nothing about JavaFX — it only calls these methods. Background threads must wrap their calls in Platform.runLater before firing any callback that touches the scene graph.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Yostin Ramirez, Lesly Zapata, Joseph Terreros
See Also:
  • GameEventAdapter

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    onCardPlayed(IPlayer player, Card card, int newSum)
    Called after any player successfully plays a card.
    void
    onDeckReshuffled()
    Called when the deck runs out and the table pile is reshuffled into a new draw pile, so the UI can show a brief indicator.
    void
    onGameOver(IPlayer winner)
    Called once when the game ends.
    void
    onPlayerEliminated(IPlayer eliminated)
    Called when a player cannot make a legal move and is eliminated.
    void
    onTurnStarted(IPlayer player)
    Called at the start of each turn to signal which player must act next.

  • Method Details

    • onCardPlayed

      void onCardPlayed(IPlayer player, Card card, int newSum)
      Called after any player successfully plays a card.
      Parameters:
      player - the player who played
      card - the card that was played
      newSum - the table sum after the play

    • onPlayerEliminated

      void onPlayerEliminated(IPlayer eliminated)
      Called when a player cannot make a legal move and is eliminated.
      Parameters:
      eliminated - the player removed from the game

    • onGameOver

      void onGameOver(IPlayer winner)
      Called once when the game ends.
      Parameters:
      winner - the surviving player, or null if all were eliminated

    • onTurnStarted

      void onTurnStarted(IPlayer player)
      Called at the start of each turn to signal which player must act next.
      Parameters:
      player - the player whose turn is beginning

    • onDeckReshuffled

      void onDeckReshuffled()
      Called when the deck runs out and the table pile is reshuffled into a new draw pile, so the UI can show a brief indicator.
